author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر محمد بن الحسين بن عبد الله الآجُرِّيُّ البغدادي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Sunni scholar known for his contributions to adab, tasawwuf, and hadith.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A work on self-discipline and moral refinement, reflecting the author's focus on spiritual and ethical development.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the broader Islamic tradition of adab literature, emphasizing the importance of self-control and adherence to Islamic values.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Abu Ubaydah Mashhur bin Hasan Al-Salman is a well-regarded editor known for his work on classical Islamic texts.
